text_block_list.text:
While on the way back from an outing, Hishi
Amazon abruptly stops in her tracks and turns to
me with a stern look.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
It's time to settle things, Teach. Come on, follow
my lead!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: You'll find out soon enough!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: All right, we're here! Ahhh... the air is so crisp.
choice_data_list: Why'd you bring me to this riverside campsite?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Cause we can have an all-out, no-holds-barred
battle out here!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Now brace yourself, Teach! It's time for our
one-on-one!
choice_data_list: A-are you challenging me to a fight?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I've been tryin' to figure out what the most
important thing about cooking is for ages...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: And I've finally found my answer!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna use that all-important thing while
cooking and let you try the dish once I'm done!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
And if you can figure out what the secret is, it's
your win!
choice_data_list:
You had me worried for a second there... but
you're on!

You had me worried for a second there... but
you're on!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Great! I'm gonna have to make the best dish I
can, or else all my feelings and hard work'll go to
waste!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Wait right here. I'm gonna go hunt and forage the
best ingredients I can and cook my way to
victory!

Hishi Amazon gathers a bounty of fresh fish and
veggies from our surroundings, and cooks them
skillfully on a camping stove.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
All right, it's just about ready! With my special
super-powered stove...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I'll roast this fish in a flash! Grraaah!
Sizzle!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Phew... Grub's up! I humbly name this spread
"Camp Barbecue So Good, It'd Move Even a
Monster to Tears"!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Eat up and savor it all, Teach! And once you're
done, go ahead and try to guess the answer I've
finally found!

I eat through a hearty plate of grilled fish and
wild vegetables cooked to perfection...
Everything tastes amazing.

After tasting the dish, I conclude that the
all-important thing Hishi Amazon used in her
cooking must be...
choice_data_list: The power to conquer the toughest ingredients!
Consideration for the people you're feeding.
Sorry, I don't have a clue!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: ...! Now what makes you say that?

I tell her how I was able to sense the competitive
spirit she used to dominate even the strongest
ingredients.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I knew you would get it right, Teach. Yup, I came
to the conclusion that this spirit of mine's the
most important thing about cooking.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Well, it took some experimenting. There's a lot of
things you need in order to cook, like knowledge,
technique, and heart...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
But none of those things are where my true roots
are. See, my roots come from my fiery Kentucky
spirit!
Woosh! Crackle, crackle!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! That meat was the best of the best—but
I'm better, and I grilled it real good!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I wanted you to feel that thrill—to tackle a huge
plate with all your heart, and come out on top.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I know that to most people, the fires of my dad's
grill may not have looked like anything special...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
But I can feel them burning in me, roaring higher
and higher!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
And now, I think I finally get why my dad told me
why I had to figure out the answer myself.

Hishi Amazon has found an answer only she could
have come up with.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Haha, still, I didn't think you'd guess the right
answer immediately. What're the chances?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
How were you even able to see through me that
easily?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Gaaah! Okay, you win, you win! I've lost in more
ways than one!
Splash!

Hishi Amazon sprints towards the stream and
dives in it.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Haha... I dunno, just needed to cool off a bit. I
was startin' to feel really hot.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'll just swim around for a bit as punishment for
losing our battle! Now stop staring at me!

Hishi Amazon dives under the water in order to
conceal her face.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: ...Hm. What makes you say that?

Hishi Amazon has seasoned everything to my
liking.

In other words, the answer she came up with must
be to prioritize the tastes and preferences of the
person she's serving.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
...Too bad, 'cause you're wrong! And that makes
me the winner, Teach!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I mean, of course I made sure to season
everything well. Let me have a quick bite to see
what you mean...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Munch.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wait, all this stuff is perfectly tailored to your tastes!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: The heck! What if you're right? But I'm the one that made all this...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Ahahaha! All right, fine! It looks like it's my loss!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I guess I was subconsciously being influenced by
you.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: But don't let this one victory get to your head!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Our next battle will be different! I definitely won't
lose to you again!
I tell her I wouldn't have it any other way.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: You don't?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I guess victory goes to me! Ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
What are you talking about, Teach? I didn't think
you'd be able to give me an answer that easily.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
In fact, I'm happy that you were so honest with
me!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Now we'll have even more opportunities to duke
it out together!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
All right! While we're at it, why don't we start our
next competition?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Let's dive straight into that stream and see who
can catch the most fish with their bare hands!

I have a fun time competing against Hishi
Amazon.
